use_cases: Display user profile pictures in navigation or header components
Show placeholder avatars during image loading states
Represent users in comments, messages, or chat interfaces
Display user avatars in card components or lists
Provide GitHub-style user indicators with optional icons
ai_summary: A lightweight, customizable avatar component that supports image display and placeholder states with smooth transitions. Features configurable sizing, rounded styling, and optional GitHub icon integration. Designed as a foundational UI element for any application requiring user representation or profile imagery.
